diagnostics.memberUnsupported: Member is not connected to any support — analytical mechanism (unstable).
diagnostics.modelUnstable: Analytical model has no supports — it cannot be solved.

diagnostics.unstable: The structure is a mechanism — static analysis does not converge (insufficient supports/connections).
diagnostics.memberSkipped: Member skipped from analysis — missing a valid section or geometry.

staticAnalysis.solved: Static analysis: solved {count, plural, one {# load combination} other {# load combinations}}.
staticAnalysis.solvedUnstable: Static analysis detected a mechanism — the structure cannot be solved (insufficient supports/connections).

diagnostics.title: Structural Check
diagnostics.columnMissingFooting: Column has no footing — foundation is missing.
diagnostics.beamUnsupportedEnd: Beam is unsupported at one or both ends.
diagnostics.memberIsolated: Isolated footing — it supports no column.
diagnostics.ratioBelowMin: Reinforcement ratio ρ={ratio}% is below the minimum {min}%.
diagnostics.ratioAboveMax: Reinforcement ratio ρ={ratio}% is above the maximum {max}%.
diagnostics.barMismatchAtJoint: Reinforcement mismatch at connection joint (differing bar count/diameter or insufficient development length).
diagnostics.columnTopAnchorageUnverified: Column top anchors into a member with no reinforcement — longitudinal bar development is not verified.
diagnostics.bearingInadequate: Soil bearing pressure p_max={pMax} kPa exceeds the allowable σ_all={capacity} kPa (utilization {utilization}%).
diagnostics.padEccentricHogging: Eccentric footing (e/L={ratio}% > {kern}% kern) — partial base uplift; a top mesh (hogging) is required.
diagnostics.punchingInadequate: Inadequate punching shear: v_Ed={vEd} MPa > v_Rd,c={vRd} MPa (utilization {utilization}%) — increase thickness or concrete grade.
diagnostics.oneWayShearInadequate: Inadequate one-way shear: v_Ed={vEd} MPa > v_Rd,c={vRd} MPa (utilization {utilization}%) — increase footing thickness.
diagnostics.cantileverSlabTooThin: Cantilever slab L={span}m: thickness {thickness}mm inadequate — L/d ratio {ldRatio} > limit {ldLimit} (deflection). Increase the slab thickness.
diagnostics.beamCantileverTorsionExceedsCapacity: Beam {width}×{depth}mm: torsion from cantilever slab T_Ed={tEd} kNm > capacity T_Rd,max={tRd} kNm — the section cannot resist the torsion even with stirrups. Enlarge the section or support the free edge.
diagnostics.sectionInfeasibleAtMaxSize: {memberKind, select, slab {Cantilever slab L={span}m: infeasible even at the maximum practical thickness {maxThickness}mm — the moment exceeds the concrete capacity. Design change required (e.g. support the free edge or reduce the cantilever).} column {Column: infeasible even at the maximum practical section {maxSize}×{maxSize}mm — the required reinforcement exceeds the maximum ratio. Design change required (reduce load or span).} beam {Beam width {width}mm: torsion T_Ed={tEd} kNm > capacity T_Rd,max={tRd} kNm even at the maximum practical depth {maxDepth}mm — infeasible. Design change required (e.g. support the free cantilever edge).} other {Section infeasible at the maximum practical size — design change required.}}
diagnostics.beamSpanImpractical: Beam {width}mm, span {span}m: the auto depth {depth}mm leaves clear height {clear}m under the beam (< {minClear}m limit). Add {columns, plural, one {# intermediate column} other {# intermediate columns}} → sub-spans ~{subSpan}m, depth ~{suggestedDepth}mm. In an atrium/pilotis the deep beam may be intended — the suggestion is optional.

structuralOrganism.autoReinforced: {count, plural, =0 {No member needed reinforcement} one {Reinforced # member} other {Reinforced # members}}
structuralOrganism.columnSectionRejected: Section {w}×{d}mm is inadequate (under-sized) — kept the minimum adequate {minW}×{minD}mm. The column stays auto-sized until you set a safe section.
structuralOrganism.beamSectionRejected: Depth {depth}mm is inadequate (under-sized) — kept the minimum adequate {minDepth}mm. The beam stays auto-sized until you set a safe depth.
structuralOrganism.slabSectionRejected: Thickness {thickness}mm is inadequate (under-sized) — kept the minimum adequate {minThickness}mm. The slab stays auto-sized until you set a safe thickness.
structuralOrganism.footingSectionRejected: Size {w}×{l}mm is inadequate (under-sized) — kept the minimum adequate {minW}×{minL}mm. The footing stays auto-sized until you set a safe size.
structuralOrganism.footingAttached: {count, plural, =0 {No column attached} one {Attached # column to the footing} other {Attached # columns to the footing}}
structuralOrganism.footingDetached: {count, plural, =0 {No column detached} one {Detached # column from the footing} other {Detached # columns from the footing}}
structuralOrganism.loadsComputed: {count, plural, one {# member received an automatic load} other {# members received automatic loads}}
structuralOrganism.loadsComputedEmpty: No member was loaded — make sure columns/beams/slabs exist (and are attached), the building has storeys, and area loads G/Q are set.
structuralOrganism.addFootingMessage: A column cannot stand on its own — add a footing below it on the Foundation level?
structuralOrganism.extendFootingMessage: There is a nearby footing — extend it to also cover this column (single organism)?
structuralOrganism.reinforceOrganismMessage: The footing was connected to the column — compute the unified reinforcement (dowels/anchorages/laps)?
structuralOrganism.addIntermediateColumnsMessage: The beam needs a {depth}mm depth for a {span}m span. Add {columns, plural, one {# intermediate column} other {# intermediate columns}} (with automatic footings) so it becomes continuous and shrinks to ~{suggestedDepth}mm? In an atrium or pilotis you may prefer the large beam — this action is optional.
structuralOrganism.addIntermediateColumnsDone: {count, plural, one {Added # intermediate column} other {Added # intermediate columns}} — the beam will shrink automatically

autoFoundation.applied: Auto foundation design — new footings: {created} (combined: {combined}, updated: {updated}, removed: {removed})

autoStudy.report: Auto Study — finished in {rounds, plural, one {# round} other {# rounds}}: changed {columns} columns, {beams} beams, {slabs} slabs, {footings} footings
autoStudy.remaining: {count, plural, one {# issue needs you} other {# issues need you}} — see the structural warnings

preset.sectionDescription: Pre-loads code, materials, seismic and soil for the whole building.

confirm.title: Change structural template?
confirm.description: All structural settings of the building will be replaced with “{preset}” and loads and reinforcement will be recomputed. Continue?

blank.label: Blank
blank.description: Bare defaults — set every structural option manually.

attachToStructural.hostMissing: Wall lost its top structural support (the supporting element was deleted).
attachToStructural.autoAttached: Walls auto-attached their top to the structural element.
attachToStructural.autoAttachedColumns: Columns auto-attached their top to the structural element.
attachToStructural.autoAttachedStairs: Stairs auto-attached their top to the structural element.
attachToStructural.pickHostPrompt: Click a beam or slab to attach to.
attachToStructural.attachedManual: Walls attached to the structural element.
attachToStructural.detached: Walls detached from the structural element.

perimeterWall.noneBuilt: No valid wall perimeter found in the selection.

foundationGrid.built: {built, plural, one {Created # footing strip from the grid.} other {Created # footing strips from the grid.}}
foundationGrid.builtWithIgnored: {built, plural, one {Created # footing strip} other {Created # footing strips}}; ignored {ignored} segments.
foundationGrid.reconciled: {created, plural, one {Added # footing strip} other {Added # footing strips}}{deleted, plural, =0 {} other {; replaced #}}{reJustified, plural, =0 {} other {; re-aligned #}}.
foundationGrid.rehosted: {rehosted, plural, one {Re-hosted # legacy strip to the grid} other {Re-hosted # legacy strips to the grid}}{created, plural, =0 {.} other {; +# new.}}
foundationGrid.upToDate: The footing grid is already up to date with the guides.
foundationGrid.insufficientGuides: At least 2 grid axes per direction are required (X and Y).
foundationGrid.empty: No valid footing strip from the current grid.

columnGrid.built: {created, plural, one {Created # column from the grid.} other {Created # columns from the grid.}}
columnGrid.builtWithSkipped: {created, plural, one {Created # column} other {Created # columns}}; {skipped, plural, one {# intersection already had one.} other {# intersections already had one.}}
columnGrid.upToDate: Every grid intersection already has a column.
columnGrid.insufficientGuides: At least 1 grid axis per direction is required (X and Y).

wallGrid.built: {created, plural, one {Created # wall from the grid.} other {Created # walls from the grid.}}
wallGrid.builtWithSkipped: {created, plural, one {Created # wall} other {Created # walls}}; {skipped, plural, one {# segment already had one.} other {# segments already had one.}}
wallGrid.upToDate: Every grid segment already has a wall.
wallGrid.insufficientGuides: At least 2 grid axes per direction are required (X and Y).

tieBeamGrid.built: {created, plural, one {Created # tie beam from the grid.} other {Created # tie beams from the grid.}}
tieBeamGrid.builtWithSkipped: {created, plural, one {Created # tie beam} other {Created # tie beams}}; {skipped, plural, one {# segment already had one.} other {# segments already had one.}}
tieBeamGrid.jointed: {jointed, plural, one {Closed # tie-beam corner.} other {Closed # tie-beam corners.}}
tieBeamGrid.upToDate: Every grid segment already has a tie beam.
tieBeamGrid.insufficientGuides: At least 2 grid axes per direction are required (X and Y).

beamGrid.built: {created, plural, one {Created # beam from the grid.} other {Created # beams from the grid.}}
beamGrid.builtWithSkipped: {created, plural, one {Created # beam} other {Created # beams}}; {skipped, plural, one {# segment already had one.} other {# segments already had one.}}
beamGrid.upToDate: Every grid segment already has a beam.
beamGrid.insufficientGuides: At least 2 grid axes per direction are required (X and Y).

slabGrid.built: {created, plural, one {Created # slab from the grid.} other {Created # slabs from the grid.}}
slabGrid.builtWithSkipped: {created, plural, one {Created # slab} other {Created # slabs}}; {skipped, plural, one {# already existed.} other {# already existed.}}
slabGrid.upToDate: This floor already has a foundation slab.
slabGrid.noFootprint: No building footprint found. Create walls, columns or beams first.

storeyGating.foundationUpperStorey: Foundations belong on a foundation or basement level — they have no structural meaning on an upper storey. (allowed)
storeyGating.beamOnFoundation: Beam on a foundation level — did you mean a foundation tie-beam / grade beam? (allowed)

gridJustification.conflict: Heads up: structural elements on the same perimeter axes have opposite justification — their faces may not align. Check whether this is intentional.

perimeterColumn.built: Created {built} structural walls from the perimeter.
perimeterColumn.noneBuilt: No valid structural-wall perimeter found in the selection.

perimeterColumnDiscrete.nWalls: {count, plural, one {# structural wall} other {# structural walls}}
perimeterColumnDiscrete.built: {count, plural, one {Created # column from the perimeter.} other {Created # columns from the perimeter.}}
perimeterColumnDiscrete.builtWalls: {count, plural, one {Created # structural wall from the perimeter.} other {Created # structural walls from the perimeter.}}
perimeterColumnDiscrete.noneBuilt: No valid perimeter found in the selection.

regionPerimeter.oversized: The boundary is {width}×{depth} m — too large for a structural member. The drawing's outer outline was likely selected.
regionPerimeter.noClosedLoop: No closed boundary found near the point — the lines may not connect.

columnAdoptSize.title: Adopt rectangle size
columnAdoptSize.blockNote: 🚫 Section {size}: the short side is below the minimum constructible size (column 120mm / shear wall 150mm per EC8) — cannot be created. Draw a larger section or keep the default.
columnAdoptSize.wallWarning: ⚠️ You selected the Column tool, but the side ratio is > 4 — per EC2 §9.6.1 this is a shear wall and will be created as one.
columnAdoptSize.message: The first click landed inside a {adopt} rectangle in the drawing. Create a {element} at this size, or keep the default {default}?

hatchOverlap.title: Region already hatched
hatchOverlap.message: This region already has a hatch. Add another one on top?

perimeterColumnConfirm.title: Section classification
perimeterColumnConfirm.message: Based on the side ratios of the sections, {walls} and {columns} will be created. The ratios of some perimeters do not allow creating a column. Continue?
perimeterColumnConfirm.intentMessage: {primary} will be created. {secondary} were also detected in the selection. Create them too?
perimeterColumnConfirm.intentMessageOnlySecondary: No elements of the requested type were detected, but {secondary} were found. Create them?
perimeterColumnConfirm.isColumnMessage: The side ratio is {aspect}:1 (≤ 4). Per Eurocode 2 §9.6.1, this is a column, not a shear wall. Create as column?

columnAdjacency.title: Adjacent columns → shear wall
columnAdjacency.message: The new column touches existing columns and together they form a shear wall. Per Eurocode 8 §5.4.2.4 a shear wall has different reinforcement than columns. Merge them into one shear wall?
columnAdjacency.merged: The columns were merged into one shear wall.

column.statusRegionLinesPick: Pick 4 lines that form a rectangle → one column filling it

We recommend a separate layer for XLINE/RAY:

• Linetype: Dashed
• Color: Cyan (ACI 4)
• Plottable: No

tooltips.auto: Auto Snap - Automatically detects the best snap points (F11)
tooltips.endpoint: Endpoints - Snap to end points of lines and arcs (E)
tooltips.midpoint: Midpoints - Snap to the middle of lines and arcs (M)
tooltips.center: Centers - Snap to the center of circles and arcs (C)
tooltips.intersection: Intersections - Snap to intersections of two objects (I)
tooltips.tangent: Tangent - Snap tangent to circles and arcs (T)
tooltips.parallel: Parallel - Snap parallel to existing lines (L)
tooltips.quadrant: Quadrants - Snap to quadrants of circles (Q)
tooltips.nearest: Nearest - Snap to the nearest point on an object (N)
tooltips.node: Nodes - Snap to nodes and points (D)
tooltips.guide: Guide - Snap to construction guide lines (G)
tooltips.constructionPoint: Point - Snap to construction snap points

bim.columnAxis: Column Axis - Snap to structural column center axis
bim.corner: Corner - Snap to BIM structural corners (wall/beam/slab/column/opening)
bim.midpoint: Midpoint - Snap to BIM edge/axis midpoints (wall/beam/slab midpoint…)
bim.wallCorner: Wall Corner - Snap to wall face corner (outer/inner edge)
bim.beamCorner: Beam Corner - Snap to beam end face corner
bim.slabCorner: Slab Corner - Snap to slab outline vertex
bim.columnCorner: Column Corner - Snap to column perimeter corner
bim.openingCorner: Opening Corner - Snap to door/window face corner
bim.mepConnector: MEP Connector - Snap to a pipe/duct/fixture/panel connection point

tooltips.text: Text - Snap to insertion point, corners, center and edge midpoints of TEXT/MTEXT
tooltips.rotationPivot: Rotation Centre - Snap to the rotation centre during a rotation operation
tooltips.rotationGrip: Rotation Grip - Snap to the entity's grips during rotation

autoArea.title: Auto Area Measurement
autoArea.noPolygon: No closed polygon found at this point

multiSelection.title: Multi-Selection

commands.xlineTooltip: Infinite reference line in both directions
commands.rayTooltip: Semi-infinite line from origin in a direction

wallOnEntity.label: Wall on 2D entity
wallOnEntity.tooltip: Pick a line or rectangle and place wall(s) on it

wallRegionLines.label: Wall from 4 lines
wallRegionLines.tooltip: Pick 4 lines that form a rectangle → one wall filling it

wallRegionInside.label: Wall inside region
wallRegionInside.tooltip: Click inside a closed rectangle → one wall filling it

wallRegionBox.label: Walls by box
wallRegionBox.tooltip: Drag a box around rectangles → one wall per rectangle

wallFromPerimeter.label: Wall from perimeter
wallFromPerimeter.tooltip: Box-select the faces of a structural element (rectangle/L/T/U) → a chain of leg walls, thickness derived from the geometry

columnRegionLines.label: Column from 4 lines
columnRegionLines.tooltip: Pick 4 lines that form a rectangle → one column filling it

columnRegionInside.label: Column inside region
columnRegionInside.tooltip: Click inside a closed rectangle → one column filling it

columnRegionBox.label: Columns by box
columnRegionBox.tooltip: Drag a box around rectangles → one column per rectangle

columnFromPerimeter.label: Structural wall from perimeter
columnFromPerimeter.tooltip: Box-select the faces of a structural element (rectangle/L/T/U/composite) → ONE RC structural wall per closed perimeter, geometry taken from the drawing

columnDiscreteFromPerimeter.label: Bulk create columns
columnDiscreteFromPerimeter.tooltip: Box-select faces → creates the columns directly; if structural walls are also detected, asks whether to create them too (auto-classified from side ratios)

columnDiscreteFromPerimeterWalls.label: Bulk create structural walls
columnDiscreteFromPerimeterWalls.tooltip: Box-select faces → creates the structural walls directly; if columns are also detected, asks whether to create them too (auto-classified from side ratios)

beamFromWall.label: Beam from wall
beamFromWall.tooltip: Pick an existing wall → a beam is created on its axis (width = wall thickness); the wall auto-adjusts its top beneath the beam

mepFixture.label: Light fixture
mepFixture.tooltip: Place a ceiling light fixture with a single click (discipline: electrical) (shortcut LF)

mepSocket.label: Socket
mepSocket.tooltip: Place a power socket (receptacle) with a single click (discipline: electrical) (shortcut SK)

electricalPanel.label: Electrical panel
electricalPanel.tooltip: Place an electrical panel with a single click — the circuit source (discipline: electrical) (shortcut EP)

mepDataOutlet.label: Data outlet
mepDataOutlet.tooltip: Place a data outlet (RJ45) with a single click — structured cabling (discipline: weak-current) (shortcut DO)

mepAirTerminal.label: Air terminal
mepAirTerminal.tooltip: Place an air terminal (supply diffuser) with a single click — HVAC supply air (discipline: mechanical) (shortcut AT)

mepAhu.label: AHU
mepAhu.tooltip: Place an air handling unit (AHU) with a single click — the supply-air network source (discipline: mechanical) (shortcut AH)

mepSprinkler.label: Sprinkler
mepSprinkler.tooltip: Place a fire sprinkler head with a single click — fire-protection terminal (discipline: fire protection) (shortcut SK)

mepFireRiser.label: Fire riser
mepFireRiser.tooltip: Place a fire riser (wet riser) with a single click — the sprinkler network source (discipline: fire protection) (shortcut FR)

mepGasMeter.label: Gas meter
mepGasMeter.tooltip: Place a gas meter with a single click — the gas supply network source (discipline: mechanical) (shortcut GM)

mepGasCooker.label: Gas cooker
mepGasCooker.tooltip: Place a gas cooker (hob) with a single click — a gas terminal (discipline: mechanical) (shortcut GC)

commsRack.label: Comms rack
commsRack.tooltip: Place a rack / patch-panel with a single click — the structured-cabling source (discipline: weak-current) (shortcut CR)

mepManifold.label: Manifold
mepManifold.tooltip: Place a plumbing manifold with a single click — 1 inlet + N outlets (discipline: plumbing)

mepDrainageCollector.label: Drainage Collector
mepDrainageCollector.tooltip: Place a drainage collector (φρεάτιο) with a single click — N inlets + 1 sewer outlet (discipline: plumbing)

mepFloorDrain.label: Floor Drain
mepFloorDrain.tooltip: Place a floor drain (σιφώνι) with a single click — square grating, 1 sanitary-drainage outlet (discipline: plumbing)

mepDrainRiser.label: Vertical Stack
mepDrainRiser.tooltip: Place a vertical drain stack (soil stack) spanning floors with a single click (discipline: plumbing)

mepSanitary.label: Sanitary Fixtures
mepSanitary.tooltip: Sanitary fixtures (WC/washbasin/shower/bathtub/bidet) — each connects to the drainage network via 1 outlet. Single-click placement (discipline: plumbing)

mepAppliance.label: Appliances
mepAppliance.tooltip: Household appliances (washing machine, …) — each connects to the cold-water supply + drainage network. Single-click placement (discipline: plumbing)

mepRadiator.label: Radiator
mepRadiator.tooltip: Place a heating radiator with a single click — supply inlet + return outlet (discipline: plumbing/heating)

mepBoiler.label: Boiler
mepBoiler.tooltip: Heating boiler / burner (supply outlet + return inlet) — single-click placement (discipline: plumbing/heating)

mepWaterHeater.label: Water Heater
mepWaterHeater.tooltip: Domestic hot water heater (DHW source) — single-click placement (discipline: plumbing/water supply)

mepUnderfloor.label: Underfloor
mepUnderfloor.tooltip: Underfloor radiant heating per area (click-click) — auto serpentine pipe loop (supply + return) inside the footprint (discipline: plumbing/heating)

railing.label: Railing
railing.tooltip: Draw a railing with 2 clicks (shortcut RL)

roof.label: Roof
roof.tooltip: Draw a pitched roof by footprint (click-click) — flat/mono-pitch/gable (shortcut RF)

floorFinish.label: Floor Finish
floorFinish.tooltip: Draw a floor finish covering per room (click-click) — Revit IfcCovering style (shortcut FF)

wallCovering.label: Wall Finish
wallCovering.tooltip: Wall finish per room/face (pick wall → face → span) — Revit IfcCovering CLADDING (shortcut WC)

wallCoveringRoom.label: Finish by Room
wallCoveringRoom.tooltip: One click on a wall → auto finish per room (boundaries from IfcSpace, use-based auto-propose) — single undo (shortcut WR)

thermalSpace.label: Thermal Space
thermalSpace.tooltip: Place a thermal space (click inside a room) — Revit IfcSpace analytical space for the heating study (shortcut TS)

spaceSeparator.label: Space Separation Line
spaceSeparator.tooltip: Draw a space separation line (click start → click end) — bounds/subdivides a thermal space without a wall, Revit IfcVirtualElement (shortcut SS)

group.label: Structural Elements
group.tooltip: Load-bearing structural elements: wall, opening, slab, column/shear wall, beam, stair, railing

wallGroup.label: Wall
wallGroup.tooltip: Wall: free, on 2D entity, in region, from perimeter

columnGroup.label: Column / Shear Wall
columnGroup.tooltip: Column, shear wall from perimeter, discrete columns from perimeter

columnsGroup.label: Columns
columnsGroup.tooltip: Column, from 4 lines, inside region, by box, bulk create

wallPiersGroup.label: Structural Walls
wallPiersGroup.tooltip: Structural wall from perimeter, bulk create structural walls

foundationGroup.label: Foundation
foundationGroup.tooltip: Foundation: isolated pad, strip footing, tie beam

foundationPad.label: Isolated footing
foundationPad.tooltip: Place an isolated pad footing with one click (Tab = anchor point)

foundationStrip.label: Strip footing
foundationStrip.tooltip: Continuous / strip footing with 2 clicks (axis start → end)

foundationTieBeam.label: Tie beam
foundationTieBeam.tooltip: Tie beam with 2 clicks — links footings/columns (Eurocode 8)

foundationStripFromWall.label: Strip footing from wall
foundationStripFromWall.tooltip: 1 click on a wall → strip footing on its axis (width = wall thickness)

foundationFromGrid.label: Footing grid from guides
foundationFromGrid.tooltip: Auto strip footings along the existing construction grid lines/intersections (one command, one undo). Arrow: perimeter alignment.

foundationFromGridInner.label: Footing grid — inner faces
foundationFromGridInner.tooltip: Perimeter strips grow INWARD (outer face on the outermost guide; zero overhang)

foundationFromGridCenter.label: Footing grid — centered
foundationFromGridCenter.tooltip: ALL strips centered (guide on the centerline; concentric)

foundationFromGridOuter.label: Footing grid — outer faces
foundationFromGridOuter.tooltip: Perimeter strips grow OUTWARD (inner face on the outermost guide; they overhang outside)

columnsFromGrid.label: Columns from grid
columnsFromGrid.tooltip: Auto column at every grid axis intersection, bound so it follows the axis (one command, one undo)

columnsFromGridInner.label: Columns — inner faces
columnsFromGridInner.tooltip: Perimeter columns flush inward (outer corner/edge on the boundary axis; zero overhang)

columnsFromGridCenter.label: Columns — centered
columnsFromGridCenter.tooltip: All columns centered on the intersection (concentric)

columnsFromGridOuter.label: Columns — outer faces
columnsFromGridOuter.tooltip: Perimeter columns flush outward (inner corner/edge on the boundary axis; protrude outside)

wallsFromGrid.label: Walls from grid
wallsFromGrid.tooltip: Auto wall on every grid axis segment, bound so it follows the axis (one command, one undo)

wallsFromGridInner.label: Walls — inner face
wallsFromGridInner.tooltip: Perimeter walls inward (exterior face on the boundary axis; zero overhang)

wallsFromGridCenter.label: Walls — centered
wallsFromGridCenter.tooltip: All walls with centerline on the axis (Wall Centerline)

wallsFromGridOuter.label: Walls — outer face
wallsFromGridOuter.tooltip: Perimeter walls outward (interior face on the boundary axis; protrude outside)

tieBeamsFromGrid.label: Tie beams from grid
tieBeamsFromGrid.tooltip: Auto tie beam on every grid axis segment, centred and bound so it follows the axis (one command, one undo). Independent of the strip-footing grid.

beamsFromGrid.label: Beams from grid
beamsFromGrid.tooltip: Auto beam on every grid axis segment, centerline on the axis and bound so it follows (one command, one undo).

beamsFromGridInner.label: Beams — inner face
beamsFromGridInner.tooltip: Perimeter beams inward (exterior face on the boundary axis; zero overhang)

beamsFromGridCenter.label: Beams — centered
beamsFromGridCenter.tooltip: All beams with centerline on the axis (concentric)

beamsFromGridOuter.label: Beams — outer face
beamsFromGridOuter.tooltip: Perimeter beams outward (interior face on the boundary axis; protrude outside)

slabMatFromGrid.label: Foundation slab from grid
slabMatFromGrid.tooltip: A single slab-on-grade covering the whole building footprint, from the floor's walls/columns/beams (one command, one undo).

slabFloorFromGrid.label: Floors from grid
slabFloorFromGrid.tooltip: One floor slab per grid bay, clipped to the beams' inner faces and notched around columns, bound so it follows (one command, one undo).

slabRoofFromGrid.label: Roofs from grid
slabRoofFromGrid.tooltip: One roof slab per grid bay, clipped to the beams' inner faces and notched around columns, bound so it follows (one command, one undo).

archGroup.label: Architectural
archGroup.tooltip: Architectural envelope elements: roof and floor finish

mepGroup.label: MEP
mepGroup.tooltip: Mechanical/Electrical/Plumbing: electrical, water supply, drainage, heating, ventilation

mepElectrical.label: Electrical
mepElectrical.tooltip: Electrical: light fixture/load and electrical panel

mepWater.label: Water Supply
mepWater.tooltip: Water supply: manifold, pipe, auto pipe networks

objectsGroup.label: Objects
objectsGroup.tooltip: Furnishings & equipment (NOT structural): 2D floorplan symbols (sanitary / kitchen / furniture) + 3D furniture — pick the symbol in the contextual tab

furniture.label: Furniture
furniture.tooltip: Place furniture (CC0) with a single click (discipline: interior) (shortcut FN)

floorplanSymbol.label: 2D Symbols
floorplanSymbol.tooltip: Place a 2D floorplan symbol — sanitary / kitchen / furniture — with a single click; pick the symbol from the contextual tab (shortcut WC)

mepDuct.label: Duct
mepDuct.tooltip: Draw a duct run with 2 clicks (discipline: mechanical) (shortcut DU)

mepPipe.label: Pipe
mepPipe.tooltip: Draw a pipe run with 2 clicks (discipline: plumbing) (shortcut PP)

mepDrainPipe.label: Drainage Pipe
mepDrainPipe.tooltip: Draw a sanitary drainage pipe with 2 clicks — a pipe preset with the drainage classification + fall (shortcut DP)

mepPipeNetwork.label: Pipe networks
mepPipeNetwork.tooltip: Auto-derive pipe networks from physical connectivity (connected pipes → one network)

waterAutoSupply.label: Auto Water Supply
waterAutoSupply.tooltip: Auto-design the domestic water network (cold/hot): Generate → review → accept

waterAutoGenerate.label: Generate
waterAutoGenerate.tooltip: Recognize the storey + auto-design the water networks (preview)

waterAutoAccept.label: Accept
waterAutoAccept.tooltip: Commit the proposal to real pipes + systems

drainageAuto.label: Auto Drainage
drainageAuto.tooltip: Auto-design the gravity drainage network (sloped): Generate → review → accept

drainageAutoGenerate.label: Generate
drainageAutoGenerate.tooltip: Recognize the storey + auto-design the drainage network (preview)

drainageAutoAccept.label: Accept
drainageAutoAccept.tooltip: Commit the proposal to real drain pipes + system

heatingAuto.label: Auto Heating
heatingAuto.tooltip: Auto-design the heating network (two-pipe, supply/return): Generate → review → accept

heatingAutoGenerate.label: Generate
heatingAutoGenerate.tooltip: Recognize the storey + auto-design the heating networks (preview)

heatingAutoAccept.label: Accept
heatingAutoAccept.tooltip: Commit the proposal to real heating pipes + systems

electricalAuto.label: Auto Electrical
electricalAuto.tooltip: Auto-design branch circuits (lighting + sockets, ΕΛΟΤ HD 384 / IEC 60364): Generate → review → accept

electricalAutoGenerate.label: Generate
electricalAutoGenerate.tooltip: Recognize the storey + auto-group loads into circuits (preview)

electricalAutoAccept.label: Accept
electricalAutoAccept.tooltip: Turn the proposal into real circuits (MepSystem)

electricalWeakAuto.label: Auto Weak-current
electricalWeakAuto.tooltip: Auto-design structured cabling (data/RJ45, ISO/IEC 11801): Generate → review → accept

electricalWeakAutoGenerate.label: Generate
electricalWeakAutoGenerate.tooltip: Recognize the storey + auto-group data outlets into channels (preview)

electricalWeakAutoAccept.label: Accept
electricalWeakAutoAccept.tooltip: Turn the proposal into real structured-cabling channels (MepSystem)

hvacAuto.label: Auto Ventilation
hvacAuto.tooltip: Auto-design the ventilation network (supply-air ducts, ASHRAE): Generate → review → accept

hvacAutoGenerate.label: Generate
hvacAutoGenerate.tooltip: Recognize the storey + auto-design the supply-air duct network (preview)

hvacAutoAccept.label: Accept
hvacAutoAccept.tooltip: Turn the proposal into real ducts + a ventilation network

fireAuto.label: Auto Fire Protection
fireAuto.tooltip: Auto-design the fire-protection network (sprinkler wet pipes, NFPA 13 / EN 12845): Generate → review → accept

fireAutoGenerate.label: Generate
fireAutoGenerate.tooltip: Recognize the storey + auto-design the sprinkler wet-pipe network (preview)

fireAutoAccept.label: Accept
fireAutoAccept.tooltip: Turn the proposal into real pipes + a fire-protection network

gasAuto.label: Auto Gas
gasAuto.tooltip: Auto-design the natural-gas supply network (supply pipes, DVGW G600 / EN 1775): Generate → review → accept

gasAutoGenerate.label: Generate
gasAutoGenerate.tooltip: Recognize the storey + auto-design the gas supply pipe network (preview)

gasAutoAccept.label: Accept
gasAutoAccept.tooltip: Turn the proposal into real pipes + a gas network

clashDetection.label: Clash Detection
clashDetection.tooltip: Detect MEP ↔ MEP ↔ structural network clashes (Coordination, ADR-435): Detect → review

clashDetectionDetect.label: Detect
clashDetectionDetect.tooltip: Scan the storey for clashes (hard + clearance violations) → plan markers

clashDetectionClear.label: Clear
clashDetectionClear.tooltip: Clear the clash report (no scene change)

arrayEditor.centerPickPrompt: Click to set the polar array center

wallEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete wall? This action cannot be undone.

material.tooltip: Select wall material for hatch pattern

bimFamilyType.label: Type
bimFamilyType.duplicateTooltip: Create an editable copy of the type
bimFamilyType.overrideTooltip: This value overrides the type on this instance
bimFamilyType.resetToTypeTooltip: Clear all overrides — return to the type's values
bimFamilyType.editTypeDescription: Changes apply to every instance of this type, on all floors.
bimFamilyType.editTypeBuiltinNotice: Built-in type (read-only). Duplicate it to edit the layers.
bimFamilyType.editTypeAffectsCount: Changes apply to {count} walls of this type.
bimFamilyType.editTypeOpeningDescription: Changes apply to every opening of this type, on all floors.
bimFamilyType.editTypeOpeningBuiltinNotice: Built-in type (read-only). Duplicate it to edit.
bimFamilyType.editTypeAffectsCountOpening: Changes apply to {count} openings of this type.

preview.title: Preview
preview.emptyHint: Load a preset or add layers to see the preview.

bimFamilyType.deleteTypeBody: Type "{name}" is used by {count} instance(s). Deleting detaches them — each keeps its current dimensions (no geometry is lost).
bimFamilyType.deleteTypeBodyUnused: Type "{name}" is not in use. Delete it?

roofFamilyType.overrideTooltip: This value overrides the type on this roof
roofFamilyType.resetToTypeTooltip: Remove all overrides — back to the type values
roofFamilyType.editTypeDescription: Changes apply to every roof of this type, on all floors.
roofFamilyType.editTypeBuiltinNotice: Built-in type (read-only). Duplicate to edit the layers.
roofFamilyType.editTypeAffectsCount: Changes apply to {count} roofs of this type.

slabFamilyType.editTypeDescription: Changes apply to every slab of this type, on all floors.
slabFamilyType.editTypeBuiltinNotice: Built-in type (read-only). Duplicate to edit the layers.
slabFamilyType.editTypeAffectsCount: Changes apply to {count} slabs of this type.

preview.title: Preview
preview.emptyHint: Load a preset or add layers to see the preview.

dna.title: Layers
dna.detachedHint: Single layer (no composition). Load a preset for layers.

envelopeFunction.tooltip: Manual override of the automatic ETICS envelope classification: Exterior = insulated, Interior = not insulated, Auto = geometry decides.

openingEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete opening? This action cannot be undone.

renumber.label: Renumber
renumber.tooltip: Renumber opening tags (fills gaps from deletions)

dialog.title: Renumber Openings
dialog.description: Fills gaps in mark numbering after deletions. Preserves manual edits by default — opt in below to wipe them too.

resetTagPosition.label: Reset Position
resetTagPosition.tooltip: Reset tag to default position (opening centre)

tagStyle.label: Tag Style
tagStyle.tooltip: Tag appearance settings (font size, colours, leader line)

dialog.title: Opening Tag Style
dialog.description: Customise tag appearance for the current project. Changes apply live to the drawing.

scheduleExport.label: Schedule PDF
scheduleExport.tooltip: Export opening schedule (doors + windows) as PDF

slabEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete this slab? This action cannot be undone.

roofEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete this roof? This action cannot be undone.

beamEditor.topElevationEndTooltip: Top-face level at the beam end. If it differs from the start level, the beam slopes linearly (sloped beam).
beamEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete this beam? This action cannot be undone.
beamEditor.reinforcementDetailTooltip: Open the beam reinforcement detail sheet (elevation, section, 3D, rebar schedule).

slabOpeningEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete slab opening? This action cannot be undone.

foundationEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete footing? This action cannot be undone.

foundationStructural.reinforcementDetailTooltip: Open the foundation reinforcement detail sheet + PDF export

slabStructural.reinforcementDetailTooltip: Open the slab reinforcement drawing sheet (plan, section, 3D, schedule) + export PDF

columnEditor.reinforcementDetailTooltip: Open a drawing sheet of the column reinforcement (plan, elevation, 3D, schedule) + export PDF
columnEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete this column? This action cannot be undone.

mepFixtureEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete fixture? This action cannot be undone.
mepFixtureEditor.editCircuitTooltip: Select the source panel to manage this fixture's circuit (rename / colour / members).

mepManifoldEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete manifold? This action cannot be undone.

electricalPanelEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete electrical panel? This action cannot be undone.

mepDrainageCollectorEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete catch basin? This action cannot be undone.

mepFloorDrainEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete floor drain? This action cannot be undone.

mepSanitaryFixtureEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete sanitary fixture? This action cannot be undone.

mepApplianceFixtureEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete appliance? This action cannot be undone.

mepRadiatorEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete radiator? This action cannot be undone.

mepBoilerEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete boiler? This action cannot be undone.

mepWaterHeaterEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete water heater? This action cannot be undone.

mepUnderfloorEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete underfloor heating? This action cannot be undone.

floorFinishEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete floor finish? This action cannot be undone.

wallCoveringEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete wall finish? This action cannot be undone.

hatchEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete hatch? This action cannot be undone.

thermalSpaceEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete thermal space? This action cannot be undone.

mepSegmentEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete element? This action cannot be undone.

mepCircuit.createTooltip: Create an electrical circuit from the selected panel (source) and fixtures (members).
mepCircuit.name: Name
mepCircuit.addMembersTooltip: Add the selected fixtures to the current circuit (moved from another circuit if already assigned).
mepCircuit.removeMembersTooltip: Remove the selected member fixtures from the current circuit.

mepPipeNetwork.createTooltip: Create a pipe network from the selected manifold (source) and pipes (members). The system type (water/heating) is inherited from the manifold.
mepPipeNetwork.addMembersTooltip: Add the selected pipes to the current network (moved from another network if already assigned).
mepPipeNetwork.removeMembersTooltip: Remove the selected member pipes from the current network.

subcategories.label: Subcategories
subcategories.resetAllConfirmBody: All subcategories across every category will revert to defaults. This cannot be undone from here.

hideBim.label: DXF Only
hideBim.tooltipHide: Hide all structural BIM elements — only the imported DXF entities remain visible
hideBim.tooltipShow: Restore visibility of structural BIM elements

mepWire.label: Wires
mepWire.tooltipHide: Hide the MEP circuit wires from the view

drainPipe.label: Drainage
drainPipe.tooltipHide: Hide the sanitary drainage pipes from the view

colorBySystem.label: Colour by System
colorBySystem.tooltipEnable: Colour fixtures, panels and wires by their circuit (system)
colorBySystem.tooltipDisable: Turn off colour-by-system — use the default colour

heatLoad.label: Heat Load
heatLoad.tooltipEnable: Show analytical heat load per space (heat-map + Φ in W)

finishSkin.label: Finished Face
finishSkin.tooltipEnable: Show column/beam plaster finish (perimeter skin per exposed face)
finishSkin.tooltipDisable: Hide plaster finish — show bare structural core

reinforcement.label: Reinforcement
reinforcement.tooltipEnable: Show column reinforcement (longitudinal bars + stirrups) in plan, section & 3D

pipeSizing.label: Pipe Sizing
pipeSizing.tooltipEnable: Show proposed diameter (DN) + velocity per heating pipe (velocity + friction)

analysisDiagrams.label: M/V/N Diagrams
analysisDiagrams.tooltipEnable: Show the bending-moment diagram per load-bearing beam from the static analysis (along the member axis)

utilization.label: Utilization
utilization.tooltipEnable: Colour members by reinforcement utilization (As,req/As,prov): green adequate, orange marginal, red over-utilized

balancing.label: Hydraulic Balancing
balancing.tooltipEnable: Show circuit pressure drop (ΔP) + required balancing-valve kv preset per radiator; highlight the worst (index) circuit + required pump head

thermalStudy.label: Heating Study
thermalStudy.tooltip: Export the multi-section heating mechanical study (summary + loads + radiators + pipes + balancing) as a PDF for the active floor

realisticMaterials.label: Realistic Materials
realisticMaterials.tooltipEnable: Realistic PBR materials (albedo/normal/roughness/ao textures) on BIM elements
realisticMaterials.tooltipDisable: Turn off realistic materials — use flat colours

mepConductors.label: Conductors
mepConductors.tooltip: Number of conductors (hot/neutral/ground) — drawn as home-run tick marks

penTable.label: Pen Table
penTable.rightClickHint: Right-click a cell to reset it to default
penTable.resetAriaLabel: Reset pen table to ISO defaults

thermalEnvelope.label: Apply Thermal Envelope

dialog.title: Thermal Envelope (ETICS)
dialog.description: Define material, thicknesses and zones for the floor's external insulation shell.

thermalEnvelope.kenakWarning: Below the KENAK advisory minimum — allowed, but review the thermal performance.

regions.title: Boundaries by region
regions.description: Insulation override per detected floor boundary — written to all of the boundary's elements.
regions.empty: No boundaries detected on this floor.

performance.noZone: Set a climate zone to check KENAK compliance.

furnitureEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete furniture? This action cannot be undone.

footingConnect.attachTooltip: Attach the selected columns to the selected footing (select 1 footing + columns)
footingConnect.detachTooltip: Detach the selected columns (or all columns of the selected footing) from the footing

tooltips.bimSchedule: Open BIM Schedule — export structural elements
tooltips.thermalEnvelope: Apply a unified external thermal envelope (ETICS) to the floor
tooltips.print: Print the drawing to PDF, printer or plotter (from 2D or 3D)
tooltips.export: Export DXF & BIM entities to a file (DXF / IFC / PDF) — DXF only, BIM only or both, per floor or all together
tooltips.autoStudyOrganism: Studies the whole floor by itself: iterates loads → sizing → reinforcement → footings → check, until nothing is red (or up to 10 rounds). One Ctrl+Z undoes the whole study
tooltips.autoReinforceOrganism: Auto-reinforce the selected structural members (or the whole floor) with the minimum valid reinforcement per the active code
tooltips.computeTakedownLoads: Auto footing loads: column tributary area × storeys × area loads (G/Q) → service design load (never overwrites manual loads)
tooltips.runStructuralAnalysis: 3D frame static linear analysis (K·u=F) → real internal forces M/V/N + per-member diagrams (informational — does not replace tributary design loads)

symbolPicker.title: Symbol Picker
symbolPicker.hint: Click to insert symbol at current position

pathDeletion.title: Path Deletion
pathDeletion.body: This entity is referenced by {count} array(s). Choose how to proceed.

emptySource.title: Empty Array Source
emptySource.body: No source entities remain in the array.

validation.sourceTypeNotAllowed: Entity type is not supported as an array source.
validation.countMustBePositive: Rows and columns must be positive.

stairAdvancedPanel.title: Stair Advanced Properties
stairAdvancedPanel.emptyState: Select a stair to see its properties.

persistence.title: Persistence
persistence.editingByOther: Another user is editing this stair

columnAdvancedPanel.title: Column Properties
columnAdvancedPanel.emptyState: Select a column to see its properties.

beamAdvancedPanel.title: Beam Properties
beamAdvancedPanel.emptyState: Select a beam to see its properties.

slabAdvancedPanel.title: Slab Properties
slabAdvancedPanel.emptyState: Select a slab to see its properties.

foundationAdvancedPanel.title: Foundation Properties
foundationAdvancedPanel.emptyState: Select a foundation element to see its properties.

wallAdvancedPanel.title: Wall Advanced Properties
wallAdvancedPanel.emptyState: Select a wall to see its properties.

persistence.title: Persistence
persistence.editingByOther: Another user is editing this wall

saveAsType.title: Wall type
saveAsType.hint: Save the current composition as a reusable wall type.

dna.title: Layer Composition
dna.detachedHint: This wall has no layers (manual thickness). Load a preset to start composition.

hardErrors.dnaThicknessMismatch: The sum of the layers does not match the wall thickness

codeViolations.thicknessBelowMin: Thickness is below the minimum allowed
codeViolations.exteriorBelowNokMin: Exterior load-bearing wall below the minimum thickness (NOK code)

codeViolations.tooSmallForKind: Opening is smaller than the minimum for this type

hardErrors.invalidIShapePlateThickness: Flange or web thickness is below the minimum (5mm)
hardErrors.invalidIShapeFlangeOverlap: Flanges overlap — section depth is too small

hardErrors.invalidPolygonSides: Sides must be an integer between 3 and 12
hardErrors.invalidIShapePlateThickness: Flange or web thickness below minimum (5mm)
hardErrors.invalidIShapeFlangeOverlap: Flanges overlap — section depth is too small
hardErrors.invalidUshapeLeg: Invalid U-shape leg thickness — exceeds width
hardErrors.invalidUshapeBase: Invalid U-shape base thickness — exceeds depth
hardErrors.invalidCompositePolygon: Invalid composite section polygon — needs at least 3 vertices with non-zero area
hardErrors.dimensionNotConstructible: Section below the minimum constructible size (120mm) — not a buildable RC structural member (no room for cover + reinforcement)
hardErrors.shearWallThicknessNotConstructible: Shear wall thickness below the Eurocode 8 minimum (150mm) — non-compliant/non-constructible wall

codeViolations.shearWallAspectRatioBelow: Length-to-thickness ratio below 4 — not a shear wall
codeViolations.sectionAngleTooAcute: Section corner too acute — hard to reinforce/cast
codeViolations.reinforcementRatioBelowMin: Longitudinal reinforcement ratio below code minimum (ρ_min)
codeViolations.reinforcementRatioAboveMax: Longitudinal reinforcement ratio above code maximum (ρ_max = 4%)

hardErrors.zeroLengthAxis: Axis has zero length — start and end coincide

credits.title: Third-party Credits & Licences
credits.intro: Third-party assets (3D models, textures, environments) used by the app.

hardErrors.nonPositiveBodyHeight: Boiler height must be greater than 0

hardErrors.dimensionTooSmall: Dimension is below the minimum allowed
hardErrors.nonPositiveBodyHeight: Water heater height must be greater than 0

hardErrors.pathTooShort: The railing path must have at least 2 points
hardErrors.nonPositiveHeight: Railing height must be greater than 0
hardErrors.nonPositiveSpacing: Baluster spacing must be greater than 0

codeViolations.guardrailHeight: Guardrail height is outside the 1000-1100mm range
codeViolations.balusterGap: Baluster clear gap exceeds the 10cm ball rule

layerManagerDialog.title: Layer Manager
layerManagerDialog.description: Manage layer visibility, color and properties (Ctrl+L).

floorManagementDialog.title: Building Floors
floorManagementDialog.description: Manage floors, elevations and foundation — changes update the drawing levels automatically.
floorManagementDialog.noBuilding: No building is linked to this drawing.

hardErrors.dimensionTooSmall: Dimension is below the minimum allowed
Dimension is below the minimum allowed

footnotes.lossBreakdownVentilation: Ventilation = max(Infiltration, Designed vent.) — only the larger branch is counted in Total (EN 12831-1 §6.3.3).

empty.no-fixtures: No sanitary fixtures recognized for water supply on this storey.
empty.no-source: No water-supply source (manifold/boiler) found — network skipped.

empty.no-fixtures: No sanitary fixtures recognized for drainage on this storey.
empty.no-collector: No drainage collector (φρεάτιο) found — network skipped.

empty.no-terminals: No heating terminals recognized on this storey.
No luminaires or sockets recognized on this storey.
empty.no-source: No electrical panel found — no circuits generated.

empty.no-terminals: No data outlets recognized on this storey.
empty.no-source: No comms-rack found — no channels generated.

empty.no-terminals: No air terminals recognized on this storey.
empty.no-source: No AHU (supply-air source) found — network skipped.

empty.no-terminals: No sprinkler heads recognized on this storey.
empty.no-source: No fire riser (source) found — network skipped.

empty.no-terminals: No gas appliances recognized on this storey.
empty.no-source: No gas meter (source) found — network skipped.

columnDetail.dialogDescription: Drawing sheet of the selected column's reinforcement — plan, elevation, 3D perspective, reinforcement schedule and title block, fully dimensioned.

foundationDetail.dialogDescription: Drawing sheet of the selected footing's reinforcement — plan, section, 3D perspective, reinforcement schedule and title block, fully dimensioned.

slabDetail.dialogDescription: Drawing sheet of the selected slab's reinforcement — plan, section, 3D perspective, reinforcement schedule and title block, fully dimensioned.

beamDetail.dialogDescription: Drawing sheet of the selected beam's reinforcement — elevation, section, 3D perspective, rebar schedule and drawing data, fully dimensioned.

print.dialogDescription: Export the current drawing to PDF, printer or plotter.

plotStyle.label: Plot style
plotStyle.hint: White/by-layer lines become black on white paper; lineweights at the real print DPI.

print.plotterNote: For printer/plotter: choose “Open & Print” and select the device in your system print dialog.

export.dialogDescription: Export the DXF & BIM entities to a file. Choose format, content and floor scope.

floorScopes.all-zip: All floors — ZIP (one file per floor)
floorScopes.all-single: All floors — single file (layer per floor)

export.scopeConflict: IFC contains BIM entities only. Choose “DXF & BIM” or “BIM only”.
